title: verbascum charputense var. adenophorum
intro: Verbascum charputense var. adenophorum, commonly known as Himalayan mullein or Adenophorum, is a plant species belonging to the mullein family, characterized by its tall, white or pinkish flowers and gray-green leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum charputense var. adenophorum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Verbascum charputense var. adenophorum is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
